dialogues: You just saw four rectangles and noticed differences between them. Things like how many rows they had or how long each row was. Now you're going to build your own rectangles on the grid, one row at a time. When you tap Check, you'll see how many squares you used. And we'll write a sentence that names what that area means. Everything we do today builds to one sentence: ___ is a multiple of ___ because ___ × ___ = ___. Let's build the first rectangle now.
